data.label: Persona 身份验证
data.description: Persona 提供了一个强大且安全的平台，帮助组织收集、验证、存储和分析全球任何个人的身份。前端的转化优化用户界面让你可以在几分钟内轻松开始身份验证。

data.label: Persona Inquiry
data.description: Persona provides a powerful, secure platform to help organizations collect, verify, store, and analyze the identity of any individual in the world. A frontend, conversion-optimized user interface makes it easy to start verifying identities in minutes.
